script.playerTouches:
scrollMessage(title="Wonderful news", text="Your 150 years' house arrest, punishment for the reckless and irresponsible use of highly unstable magic, has been ended by the wizard council. You are now free to go!
   bye!");
   door3.unlock();
   this.message("");
   player.inventory.set("spellCredits", 6 - player.difficulty);
   trade(
      title="Choose Your Starting Spells",
      currency="spellCredits",
      currencyLabel="Choose:",
      entries=[{
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"fireball",
         "image":"/assets/images/thumbnails/fireball.png",
         "label":"Fireball",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"freeze",
         "image":"/assets/images/magic/iceball.png",
         "label":"Freeze",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"spikes",
         "image":"/assets/images/magic/spike.png",
         "label":"Spikes",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"teleport",
         "image":"/assets/images/magic/teleport.png",
         "label":"Teleport",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"invisibility",
         "image":"/assets/images/magic/invisible.png",
         "label":"Invisibility",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"shield",
         "image":"/assets/images/magic/shield.png",
         "label":"Shield",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"omnivision",
         "image":"/assets/images/thumbnails/eye.png",
         "label":"Omnivision",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"healing",
         "image":"/assets/images/thumbnails/cross.png",
         "label":"Healing",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type":"magic",
         "id":"speed",
         "image":"/assets/images/thumbnails/speed.png",
         "label":"Speed",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }, {
         "type": "magic",
         "id":"maze",
         "image": "/assets/images/thumbnails/maze.png",
         "label":"Pathfinder",
         "buy":1,
         "sell":1
      }
   ]);
   
   window1.open()
   window2.open()
   window3.open()
   window4.open()
   window5.open()
   window6.open()
   window7.open()
   window8.open()
   window9.open()
   window10.open()
   window11.open()
   
   this.deactivate()
